title: FrameForge
description: Boost your FPS and keep gameplay smooth with FF! A lightweight SMP-ready modpack featuring top-tier optimization mods plus essential QoL tweaks. Experience faster loading, reduced lag, and stable multiplayer performance without losing the vanilla feel.
body:
FrameForge is a streamlined Minecraft 1.21.5 modpack built for maximum performance and multiplayer stability. Designed for SMPs, FF combines powerful optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore.

What you get:

Higher FPS & smoother gameplay on any system

Faster world loading and reduced memory usage

Essential utilities without breaking the vanilla vibe

Server-friendly setup — minimal conflicts, stable play

Whether you're hosting friends or joining a community server, FrameForge gives you the frames you need and the speed you want — all while staying clean and bloat-free.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means the world! https://ko-fi.com/pug116
